descriptionHtml:
Bavaria 45 Cruiser For Sale 2010|Guest Cabins:4|Guest Bathroom:3

ONE OWNER

This Bavaria 45 Cruiser For Sale 2010 is a well‑kept example of one of Bavaria’s most successful models, offering space, comfort and reliable performance for both family cruising and longer passages. Built in 2010 and still under the care of her first and only owner, she presents in good condition, with regular maintenance carried out over the years. Flying an Italian flag and currently moored in the Marche region.

Specifications

Model: Bavaria 45 Cruiser
Flag: Italian
Year: 2010
Length Overall: 13.60 m
Width: 4.32 m
Draft: 2.10 m
Owners: 1
Registered: Yes
Safety Certificate Expiry: 2028
Persons Allowed: 10
CE Class: A
Mooring: Marche

Deck and Hull
– White GRP hull
– Teak cockpit
– Cast iron keel, boot shape
– Sprayhood (crystal to replace)
– Bimini
– Teak cockpit table
– Electric stern platform

Interiors
– 4 double cabins
– 3 toilets
– 1 shower box
– Mahogany interior (to be adjusted)
– Cooker (3 burners)
– Oven
– Fridge
– Dinette in sky
– Entrance ladder to be repaired

Engine
– Volvo Penta D2‑55, 55 hp
– Year 2010
– 3000 hours (updated 10/2025)
– Fuel capacity 295 L
– S‑drive
– 3‑blade fixed propeller
– Wheel steering
– Lewmar 6 kW bow thruster

Instruments
– Autopilot
– VHF
– ECO
– Log
– Compass
– Stereo
– Garmin plotter at wheel
– Wind station
– Raymarine instruments

Installations
– 12/220V
– 5 batteries (2 service, 1 engine, 2 bow thruster)
– 1 water tank, 400 L, plastic
– Bilge pumps 1+1
– Battery charger
– Water heater
– Fresh water tank
– Black water pump
– Outside shower

Sails and Rigging
– Deck‑stepped aluminium mast
– 4 Lewmar winches
– Rigid rodkicker
– Backstay with adjuster
– Furling mainsail (dacron 2010)
– Furling genoa (dacron 2010)

Safety and Docking
– Tender
– Honda 2.3 outboard
– Anchor windlass
– Anchor + spare
– 50 m chain
– Mooring lines
– Life raft (exp. 2027)
– 6 fenders
